mapper.select: SELECT id, date, content, mood, weather, created_at, updated_at FROM diaries ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, date, content, mood, weather, created_at, updated_at FROM diaries WHERE date = #{date} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diaries (date, content, mood, weather, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{date}, #{content}, #{mood}, #{weather}, NOW(), NOW())
